g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the staff mobile app screen look like when advancing a service status — button, confirmation dialog, and loading state?')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot PATCH /appointments/{id}/status endpoint — request body, validation, transition guard, and response')
sendPrompt('Write the JPA/Hibernate code to update appointment status and insert a new row into APPOINTMENT_STATUS_LOG atomically in one transaction')
sendPrompt('Write a Spring Boot NotificationService that builds and sends an FCM push notification when an appointment status changes — including the payload structure')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) with Spring Boot to send push notifications to Android and iOS mobile apps?')
sendPrompt('What does the push notification look like on the customer\'s phone for each status change — title, body, and deep-link behavior per stage?')
sendPrompt('How should the customer mobile app handle a push notification tap — deep linking directly to the service tracker or approval screen?')
sendPrompt('How should the customer mobile app poll for status updates as a fallback — what interval and endpoint should it use if push notifications are delayed?')

svg.text: customer app polls if push missed
